---
title: "math-437-portfolio"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo

about:
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rdel3059
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/rdel3059/
---

## Education

California State University, Fullerton | Fullerton, CA
MS in Statistics | Sept 2026 - Present

University of California, Santa Barbara | Santa Barbara, CA
B.S in Statistics | Sept 2012 - July 2016
